design_philosophy: Scholarly, precise, methodical, and authoritative. The interface must feel like an academic manuscript or a high-precision lab tool, not a playful chatbot. We use Swiss & High-Contrast principles: stark black and white, rigid grid systems, sharp borders (no rounded corners), and distinct typographic hierarchy.

typography.installation: Add Google Fonts imports for Chivo, IBM Plex Mono, and IBM Plex Sans in index.css

layout.spacing_scale: Generous spacing for breathing room, specifically p-4 to p-8 for containers, gap-8 for structural separation.
layout.page_structure: Two-column dashboard layout. Left sidebar for history (w-64 or w-72 on desktop, hidden on mobile behind hamburger). Main right area for chat stream.
layout.chat_container: max-w-4xl mx-auto w-full px-4 sm:px-8 pb-32 pt-8
layout.borders: Use sharp borders. rounded-none or max rounded-sm for subtle interactive elements. 1px solid borders for separation.

sidebar.history_item: flex items-center gap-3 p-3 text-sm text-text_secondary hover:bg-surface_hover hover:text-text_primary transition-colors cursor-pointer border-l-2 border-transparent hover:border-text_primary
sidebar.new_chat_btn: w-full flex items-center justify-center gap-2 bg-text_primary text-white p-3 hover:bg-black/80 transition-colors font-mono uppercase text-xs tracking-widest

chat_input.container: fixed bottom-0 right-0 left-0 md:left-64 bg-background/90 backdrop-blur-xl border-t border-border p-4 sm:p-6
chat_input.input_field: flex-1 bg-surface border border-border focus:border-text_primary focus:ring-1 focus:ring-text_primary p-4 text-base font-body outline-none transition-all placeholder:text-text_secondary/50 rounded-none
chat_input.send_button: bg-accent_primary text-white px-6 sm:px-8 py-4 hover:bg-accent_primary_hover transition-colors font-bold flex items-center justify-center rounded-none

tutor_message.section_wrapper: pl-4 border-l-2 border-border flex flex-col gap-2
tutor_message.paso_activo: border-l-2 border-accent_primary pl-4 bg-accent_primary/5 p-4 text-accent_primary
tutor_message.accion_de_cierre: border-l-2 border-border pl-4 p-4 font-bold italic
tutor_message.label: font-mono text-xs uppercase tracking-widest text-text_secondary mb-2 block

user_message.bubble: bg-surface border border-border p-4 max-w-[80%] text-text_primary font-body

empty_state.container: flex flex-col items-center justify-center h-[60vh] text-center max-w-xl mx-auto
empty_state.title: font-heading text-3xl font-black mb-4
empty_state.subtitle: text-text_secondary mb-12 font-mono text-sm uppercase tracking-widest
empty_state.suggestion_card: text-left p-4 border border-border hover:border-text_primary hover:shadow-sm cursor-pointer transition-all bg-background rounded-none group

interactions.hover: Hover states must increase contrast. Text becomes darker, borders become sharper.
interactions.focus: All interactive elements must have a sharp 1px or 2px outline (ring-1 ring-text_primary).
interactions.animation: Minimalist. Avoid bouncy animations. Use strict opacity and subtle translate transitions (duration-200 ease-out).

image_urls.description: Optional abstract geometric architecture photo to use at low opacity (e.g., 5%) as a watermark in the empty state or background.

media.icons: Use lucide-react. Prefer sharp, un-rounded icons if possible, or stick to standard Lucide with strokeWidth 1.5 for a delicate, precise look.

testing.requirements: All interactive elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='send-button', data-testid='new-session-button', data-testid='prompt-input').

instructions_to_main_agent: Install lucide-react and react-markdown for message rendering.
Import Chivo, IBM Plex Mono, and IBM Plex Sans from Google Fonts.
Implement the UI precisely without border-radius (rounded-none) to maintain the brutalist, scholarly aesthetic.

Ensure the tutor's response strictly renders in the three distinct visual sections (Archivo de Datos, Paso Activo, Acción de Cierre) using the classes provided in the components.tutor_message guidelines.
Do not use conversational UI bubbles for the tutor; use the manuscript/document style described.
Add 'data-testid' attributes to all interactive elements.
